repos.description: Self hosted, real-time digital human agent platform. Build voice-first AI agents with WebRTC, persona memory, tools, RAG, and optional digital-human video.

Rapida is an open-source, end-to-end voice AI orchestration platform for building real-time conversational voice agents with audio streaming, STT, TTS, VAD, multi-channel integration, agent state management, and observability.
A PBX written by rust
Official Python SDK for Deepgram.
Official JavaScript SDK for Deepgram.
🎭 AI Avatar / digital human platform — upload a photo, clone a voice, talk to any face in real time with lip-sync video. Open-source, self-hosted. Claude · Whisper · Chatterbox · MuseTalk.
A SIP/WebRTC voice agent
Self-hosted AI voice agent
Run a <400ms latency Voice Agent on just 4GB VRAM. Fully offline, no API keys required. Optimized for GTX 1650 and edge robotics with zero-copy inference. (Apache 2.0)
Open-source voice agent OS. Rust runtime, AI-driven builder, sub second latency. Self-host everything.
Official Go SDK for Deepgram.
On-device speech SDK for Android — ASR, TTS, VAD, and noise cancellation powered by ONNX Runtime with Qualcomm NNAPI acceleration
Turn any SIP call into a realtime AI voice agent (OpenAI Realtime / Deepgram/Gemini Live/xAI Grok Voice)
Official .NET SDK for Deepgram.
Voice-powered AI assistant platform — connect any LLM, any TTS, with a live web canvas, music generation, and agent orchestration using openclaw. Install: npx openvoiceui setup
The Open Source Voice Agent Platform. Orchestrate ultra-low latency AI pipelines for real-time conversations over WebRTC.

The open-source foundation for production Voice AI. Build, scale, and own your AI calling infrastructure. Bridge legacy SIP to modern LLMs over ultra-low latency WebRTC pipelines. Zero platform fees, BYOK, and full data sovereignty.
Open-source, self-hosted AI phone receptionist powered by OpenAI Realtime API. High-fidelity speech-to-speech voice agent. Drop-in replacement for overpriced AI receptionist SaaS.
Useful demo applications for Deepgram Voice AI APIs, using the Rust language! 🦀
From-scratch voice agents in Python: end-to-end speech pipelines, runnable chapters, and a small shared library. Local models, explicit streaming behavior.
On-device VAD / streaming STT / TTS / diarization in C++17 (ONNX + LiteRT) with a voice-agent pipeline. Linux, Windows, Android.
Test harness for voice agents. Import from Retell, VAPI, Bland, LiveKit. Run autonomous simulations. Evaluate with LLM judges.
Voice agent using LiveKit (orchestration), Cartesia (STT + TTS), and OpenAI (LLM)

Multi-provider voice AI showcase featuring 8+ providers/services (ElevenLabs + Widget, OpenAI, OpenAI Live Translations, xAI, Ultravox, Vapi, Retell, Google Gemini Live) with real-time transcripts, audio visualization, and glassmorphism UI. Built with React 19 + TypeScript.

Sunona: Next-generation voice AI infrastructure. Orchestrate intelligent, action-oriented voice agents that sound human and execute complex workflows via function calling. The faster way to build the future of talk.

Let your AI agent call your phone and talk to you — MCP servers for live, interruptible voice calls + tiered alerts, using free self-hosted pieces (pjsua2 + whisper.cpp + Linphone). No paid telephony, no extra API key.
Real-time voice AI agent with persistent memory, built on Gemini Live API and Python
Real-time voice agents with parallel async background sub-agents — conversations continue naturally while tasks run • Join the builders → https://discord.gg/mqxKaN3UKC
Open-source realtime voice agent server in Go with WebRTC (WHIP), barge-in, streaming STT/LLM/TTS pipelines, plugin system, multi-language SDKs, SIP telephony, ESP32 support & fully local mode.
Flask WebSocket proxy for Deepgram's Voice Agent API
Give Claude Code a phone number — outbound, inbound, and ring-when-done voice calls via Twilio + Patter. A Claude Code plugin.
OpenRTC lets developers run multiple LiveKit voice agents in one Python worker, sharing heavy models instead of duplicating them per process.
Hermes Live Discord Agent Plugin — full-duplex Discord voice ↔ Google Gemini Multimodal Live API, with function calling, idle hangup, transcripts, and a 3-min oneshot installer.
Beta Product - Integration examples for Thymia Sentinel, a real-time voice biomarker and safety monitoring service for voice AI agents.

Autonomous AI Agent SDK for React Native & Expo — AI reads your live UI, acts via natural language, real-time voice agent (Gemini Live), and AI-powered testing via MCP (Model Context Protocol). One component. Zero config.

A voice-first AI math tutor that helps students understand homework in real time by reading the whiteboard, talking with the student, and writing step-by-step explanations directly on a shared canvas.
微信·抖音AI语音销售引流获客工具 | 私域转化 & 多平台语音触达
A Unity package for building open-source AI voice agents that run fully locally. You can use it to build intelligent non-player characters (NPCs), game interfaces, among many other applications.
A production-oriented Levantine Text-to-Speech pipeline built on a fine-tuned XTTS-v2 optimized for real-time conversational agents.
Rust library for SIP calling and RTP media — register with a trunk or accept calls as a SIP server. Decoded PCM audio via crossbeam channels.
AI Voice Agent Setup — bland ai setup, ai voice agent tutorial, ai phone agent, vapi tutorial. for Windows
Ready-to-go LiveKit Python voice agent.
Open-source Python SDK for real-time Voice AI, voice agents, streaming audio, and observability using Rapida.

Real-time lip-synced avatar SDK. Audio in, animated face out at 25 FPS. Python + Swift + REST API. Runs on CPU (Raspberry Pi to server), NVIDIA GPU, Apple Silicon (Mac/iPad/iPhone). pip install bithuman
Example code to call Deepgram APIs on Amazon SageMaker
🎤 Build a low-latency voice agent with real-time TTS and STT, powered by Murf and AssemblyAI for seamless conversational experiences.
🤖 Optimize lead management with an AI-powered CRM assistant that delivers insights and analysis through Google Gemini AI and LangGraph.
Go library for SIP calling and RTP media — register with a trunk or accept calls as a SIP server. Decoded PCM audio via Go channels.
Live voice channel for the Hermes Telegram agent. FastAPI + python-telegram-bot + OpenAI Realtime API + brutalist PWA. One-shot deployable.
Explore clean, cutting-edge Generative-AI code—innovate, learn, and build the future of intelligent applications.
Open-source real-time Voice AI infrastructure in Go. Stream audio via WebRTC or WebSocket, connect STT → LLM → TTS pipelines, and build scalable voice agents and conversational AI applications.
Examples on how to use SLNG APIs to build Voice apps
Real-time voice + vision AI agent for Reachy Mini robot. Local LLM (Ollama), Whisper STT, Kokoro/Edge TTS, WebRTC. Runs fully on your own GPU.

Agent Skills for the Patter SDK — give your AI agent a phone number. Works in Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, Codex, Cline, Goose, Amp, Windsurf, and any harness that consumes the Agent Skills standard. One CLI: npx skills add patterai/skills
Cross-platform AI agent client for mobile and desktop, with approvals, notifications, and   self-hosted bridge support.
An open-source debugger for voice agent workflows
Rust-native voice agents for Node.js — WebRTC, VAD, barge-in, and speech events. Free on-device STT+TTS via Sherpa-ONNX; cloud vendors optional. Your LLM stays in TypeScript.

AI-powered real-time voice agent for D2C e-commerce support — handles Hindi, English & Hinglish calls, detects frustration from voice tone, escalates intelligently to human agents. Built with FastAPI, OpenAI, Sarvam AI, LangChain + FAISS.
AI phone agent starter — OpenAI Realtime + Twilio SIP + Railway + Supabase. Built live on a RoofClaw livestream.
Local-first voice RAG assistant for talking to documents with FastAPI, LangGraph, Qdrant, Ollama embeddings, Groq STT/chat, Kokoro TTS, and vanilla JS.

MCP server for the Patter Voice AI SDK — make and receive phone calls from any MCP-compatible client (Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, Codex). Streamable HTTP transport, self-hosted via git clone + npm start.
Realtime voice AI assistant — streaming STT → LLM → TTS over WebSocket, with barge-in and live translation. Runs fully local (Whisper + Ollama + Piper) or with cloud providers.
Local-first real-time voice gateway for Ollama, OpenAI-compatible local LLMs, MCP, and local AI agents: browser mic, STT, TTS, barge-in.
Transformative Evolving Neural Kinetic Agent - a local-first Python voice agent for Windows.
Local-first VAD, barge-in, and turn-taking primitives for interruptible voice agents.
Open-source recipe collection powering speechstack.com

✨🌙 Your self-hosted, voice-first AI Chief of Staff that knows you, responds to you in real-time, and delegates the heavy lifting to async functional agents. Serving as your companion, it keeps you in the loop on what your agents are doing, what's done, and what needs your attention. Built for presence, speed, and clarity — with ❤️.
🌐 Explore LLM agents and their ecosystems with this comprehensive handbook for understanding, developing, and implementing AI-driven solutions.
Real-time voice agent with persistent memory (RAG). Solves LLM context loss by storing and retrieving user insights across sessions using an async memory pipeline
生产级 Java Voice Agent 后端框架，基于 WebSocket 支持文本与 PCM 音频输入，内置 Session 与 turnId 隔离、VAD、流式 ASR、LLM、TTS、打断流程和前端联调台，并提供可自定义替换的 ASR、LLM、TTS、VAD 扩展接口。
Local-first bridge that connects your OpenAI Codex Desktop session to a Telegram bot. Talk to your coding agent from anywhere — text, files, voice notes, and optional live realtime calls.
UAE-resident voice agent service: Azure Speech + pluggable LLM (AOAI / OpenAI / Foundry) with barge-in, VAD, tools, and RAG behind a WebSocket protocol. Python & TypeScript SDKs.
Multilingual AI voice agent for government services, powered by ElevenLabs (speech), LangGraph (agent orchestration), and RAG over official documents for grounded, end-to-end phone interactions.
Customer-support voice agent — RAG-grounded answers, structured lead qualification, branded PDF + audio deliverables. Deepgram Voice Agent + FastAPI + Next.js.

Anushka — real-time multilingual AI voice agent (11 Indian languages): LiveKit WebRTC + Sarvam STT/TTS + Groq LLaMA + ASP.NET Core 9 + Three.js 3D avatar & zombie game. Post-call email summaries via Resend.
Self-hostable real-time voice agent stack
Python SDK that gives xAI Grok Voice agents persistent memory across sessions, devices, and models. LiveKit-enabled. MIT licensed.
Realtime AI Voice Assistant with conversational memory using OpenAI, STT, and TTS.

Real, forkable AI voice agent where SynapCores is the brain — caller memory, intent routing, semantic cache, RAG, generation in one database. Browser voice console (Web Speech API) + live Brain debug sidebar.

Real-time AI voice interpreter demo with Azure Voice Live, Azure Speech, and speech translation.
Open real-time voice AI engine - streaming ASR + LLM + Vision with sub-second latency. One facade, pluggable adapters, secure by default.

Phone your agent; it makes the call you hate. A voice chief-of-staff on AgentPhone + Browser Use: runs discovery, researches your leverage live on the web, negotiates the call, and reports back with the result. YC AgentPhone hackathon build.
Agent téléphonique IA entrant/sortant — Agno 2.6.8, FastAPI, Twilio Media Streams, Whisper STT, edge-tts/ElevenLabs TTS, streaming LLM→TTS, multi-agents, mémoire client, escalade humain
AI voice sales agent (OpenAI Realtime API) that pitches a configurable product and books follow-ups - over the browser or an outbound Twilio phone call, with live on-screen transcripts. Dockerized.
Reusable React and Framer voice agent component with a Cloudflare Worker backend for Claude, TTS, STT, and optional booking.
AI-powered restaurant management and ordering system with voice-call and WhatsApp automation using Groq (Whisper + LLaMA), Twilio, Vite/React, and Firebase.

Free trial pack of a professional conversational AI voice dataset. 24-bit Mono WAV, LJ Speech standard compliant. Designed for TTS and voice cloning evaluation.
Open-source directory for finding and comparing AI voice tools.

Give your AI agent a mouth, ears, and a phone number. Framework-agnostic VoIP/IVR service with Twilio — plug in any agent backend (Hermes, OpenAI, Ollama, etc).

A Cyberpunk CLI Wrapper for PI coding Agent with parallel sub-agent swarms, self-improvement memory, FTSS session search, and a SOUL.md identity layer.  HERMES AGENT, PAPER CLIP in one install use all the best ai-agent capabalities

Talk to Claude Code. A hands-free, voice-driven Claude Code agent that lives in a desktop pet — speak to it, it reads/edits files, runs commands and searches, then replies by voice. Runs on your Claude subscription (not API credits). ElevenLabs STT/TTS + local 'Claude' wake word. macOS.

Compliance enforcement middleware for voice AI pipelines: warm transfer state management, PII scrubbing, confidence-gated escalation, and HIPAA/FERPA/EU AI Act enforcement for Pipecat, LiveKit, and Twilio deployments.

Build and deploy a real-time AI Medical Voice Agent using Next.js, React, TypeScript, AssemblyAI, Clerk, and Neon DB. A full-stack SaaS app that acts as a voice-powered virtual doctor, understanding symptoms and responding in real time.

A portfolio that talks back. Open-source AI voice-agent portfolio: a Next.js site + a Python LiveKit agent that gives visitors a guided, spoken tour of your work.

Provide self-hosted AI receptionist with voice calls, FAQ handling, call transfers, and message taking using OpenAI and LiveKit integration.
Convert audio or video files into dubbed versions in multiple languages using AI-driven transcription, translation, and speech synthesis.

A reinforcement learning environment for speech-to-text models, using OpenAI's Whisper and Groq's agent framework. This project provides a pipeline to train and evaluate STT models in an RL setting, leveraging the FLEURS dataset for multilingual audio samples.

A voice agent that helps users book restaurant tables through natural conversation.

Two local AI agents call each other on a real Telegram phone line. Streaming MLX ASR + LLM + Kokoro TTS, Gemini as judge, optimization loop that tunes the call until it sounds human. Runs entirely on Apple Silicon.
